chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 1914 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.1, 2, 5, 28. 2. For orders on CMA No.5481/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.5482/2023. 09.02.2026 Mr. Pervaiz Ahmad Memon, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Salman Afzal, Collector of Customs, Exports, Karachi is pesnet and does not press the reference application, which is hereby dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
